name: Deep Fried Prawns with Batter (Jow Ha)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the prawns, leaving the tails on.
2. Sprinkle with salt and mix well. Refrigerate for two hours.
3. Mix flour, baking powder, cornstarch, egg, oil, and water to make a batter.
4. Heat wok. Add 4 cups oil and reheat.
5. Holding the prawns by the tails, dip in batter, then drop into hot oil.
6. Fry until golden, turning once. Drain.
7. Serve hot.
Do-ahead notes:
Deep fry, cool, and freeze. Preheat oven to 350°F. Place frozen prawns in a single layer on a cookie sheet and heat for 12 to 15 minutes.
Comments:
Use cocktail sauce, chili sauce, or sweet and sour sauce for dipping. One cup of prepared biscuit mix may be substituted for the flour and baking powder.
Yield: 4 servings.
